name: flow-guard resets the rolling thrash count after a sustained focus window with no tool switches
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/flow-guard && for i in 1 2 3 4 5 6; do printf '{"tool":"Bash","at":"2026-05-13T00:00:0%dZ"}\n' "$i" >> .claude-tdd-pro/flow-guard/recent.jsonl; done && printf '{"tool":"Bash","at":"2026-05-13T01:00:00Z"}\n' >> .claude-tdd-pro/flow-guard/recent.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/flow-guard/check.sh" --window-min 5 --threshold 5 --now 2026-05-13T01:01:00Z 2>out.txt && grep -q 'thrash_count=1' out.txt && ! grep -q 'warning' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
